title: News & Views - Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency
text_excerpt: News & Views - Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Skip to main content Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Join Get Involved Donate Homepage About Douglas News & Views Latest News East Lothian Courier Columns Media coverage In Parliament Hansard Parliament TV Voting Record Staffing & Other Costs Contact Privacy Policy More Menu News & Views Here you can find all the latest news about my activity in the constituency and parliament, as well as my weekly column in the East Lothian Courier and recent media coverage. If you have any questions about any of the news and views on this page, please contact me at douglas.alexander.mp@parliament.uk .
